title: Molecular Bases for Lung Development Injury and Repair

blocks.text:
ทำไม neonatologist ต้องเข้าใจ Molecular Bases of Lung Development?
ปอดคือ organ ที่ทำให้ทารกมีชีวิตอยู่ได้หลังคลอด — นั่นหมายความว่า disruption of any developmental stage = respiratory failure. (1) BPD คือ developmental arrest at saccular stage ไม่ใช่แค่ "lung damage" — เข้าใจ signaling = เข้าใจว่าทำไม BPD เกิดและจะ repair ได้อย่างไร. (2) Key pathways: FGF10, VEGF, TGF-β, CTGF, NLRP3 inflammasome — ปรากฏซ้ำใน BPD, PPHN, CDH, pulmonary hypoplasia. (3) Corticosteroids ↓ alveolarization irreversibly — เหตุผลที่ต้องระวัง postnatal dexamethasone อย่างยิ่ง. (4) VEGF ↓ ใน BPD tracheal aspirates = biomarker + therapeutic target. (5) Prematurity disrupts all 6 lung maturation events simultaneously — surfactant, alveolarization, vascularization, host defense, antioxidant, fluid clearance. เข้าใจ mechanism = เข้าใจ rationale ของ antenatal steroids, surfactant, gentle ventilation.
เป้าหมายการเรียนรู้วันนี้
อธิบาย 5 stages ของ lung development พร้อม GA และ key events ในแต่ละ stage
อธิบาย molecular regulation ของ branching morphogenesis: FGF10/FGFR2b, SHH/Spry2 feedback, BMP4, TGF-β, Wnt
อธิบาย mechanism ของ alveolarization: PDGF-A → myofibroblast → elastin → secondary septae
รู้ transcription factors ที่สำคัญ: Nkx2.1 (TTF-1), Sox2, FoxJ1, Notch — และบทบาทใน cell fate
อธิบาย surfactant system: SP-A/B/C/D, ABCA3, lamellar body, การ secrete ผ่าน catecholamine/stretch
อธิบาย pulmonary vascular development: vasculogenesis vs angiogenesis, VEGF/VEGFR2, Ang/Tie2, eNOS
เข้าใจ BPD pathogenesis: NLRP3 inflammasome → IL-1β, TGF-β/CTGF fibrosis axis, ↓VEGF
รู้ว่า hyperoxia, mechanical ventilation, และ infection disrupt แต่ละ pathway อย่างไร
รู้บทบาทของ miRNA ใน lung development และ BPD (miR-17 family, miR-489, miR-17~92 cluster)
เชื่อม molecular knowledge กับการตัดสินใจ NICU: antenatal steroid, surfactant, oxygen target, avoid postnatal dex
1. 5 Stages of Human Lung Development
Lung organogenesis เริ่มที่ 4 weeks of gestation และ continue จนถึง childhood — ดังนั้น preterm birth ไม่ว่า GA ใด ย่อมกระทบ developmental program ที่ยังดำเนินอยู่

rows: Lung bud from laryngotracheal groove; trachea + 2 main bronchi; lobar bronchi (3R, 2L); tracheoesophageal separation
Branching → 16 generations to terminal bronchioles; proximal airway differentiation (basal, goblet, ciliated, club cells); diaphragm formation completes; vascular growth parallel to airways
Terminal bronchioles → respiratory bronchioles → acini; capillary bed approximates epithelium; ATII differentiation + surfactant synthesis begins; first air-blood barrier at ~24 wk
Primary septation → thin-walled saccules; double capillary network; ATII mature → functional surfactant; ATI differentiate; elastic fiber deposition; interstitium thins
Secondary septation → ~50M alveoli at birth → ~300M adult; double capillary → single mature capillary; surface area expands 20-fold; lung volume ↑ 23-fold to adulthood

blocks.text:
Clinical Pearl — 24 สัปดาห์ = limit of viability เพราะ Canalicular threshold
เมื่อ ~24 wk = end of canalicular stage: alveolocapillary barrier얇แรก (0.6 μm), primitive acini มี capacity gas exchange เล็กน้อย. ก่อนหน้านี้ — no air-blood barrier → no viable gas exchange. ดังนั้น limit of viability ไม่ใช่เรื่อง arbitrary แต่เป็น structural biology.
2. Molecular Regulation ของ Branching Morphogenesis

Branching morphogenesis เกิดจาก epithelial-mesenchymal crosstalk ที่ถูก orchestrate โดย transcription factors, growth factors, และ ECM ใน spatiotemporal pattern ที่ precise — การ disrupt pathway ใดก็ตามอาจทำให้เกิด pulmonary hypoplasia, agenesis, หรือ malformation
2.1 Nkx2.1 (TTF-1) — Master Regulator
Nkx2.1 = thyroid transcription factor 1 (TTF-1), earliest TF ใน prospective lung/tracheal endoderm. Deletion → cystic structures, ไม่มี normal branching, ↓ SP-C
Nkx2.1 ถูก regulate โดย Wnt2/2b-β-catenin จาก mesoderm; loss of Wnt2+Wnt2b → loss of Nkx2.1 → lung agenesis. TGF-β inhibits Nkx2.1 → oppose progenitor cell fate
Nkx2.1 binds promoters ของ SP-A, SP-B, SP-C, SP-D, SCGB1A1 — positive feedback loop ที่ sustain surfactant gene expression
2.2 FGF10/FGFR2b — Driving Force

FGF10 secreted จาก mesenchyme; binds FGFR2b on epithelium → activates MAPK pathway → chemotaxis + proliferation. FGF10 gradient สูงสุดที่ distal bud tip → drives elongation/branching toward FGF10 source
Deletion Fgf10 → lung agenesis ใน mice. ↓ FGF10 → pulmonary hypoplasia + ↓ large airways. ↑ FGF10 focal → cystic structures (resembling CPAM)
Heparan sulfate proteoglycan จับ FGF10 → location-specific patterning. Retinoic acid (RA) ใน mesoderm → regulates FGF10 via RARβ + integrates Wnt/TGF-β pathways
2.3 SHH-Spry2 Negative Feedback Loop
Sonic hedgehog (Shh): expressed ใน distal epithelium → signals to mesenchyme via Gli2/3. SHH inhibits FGF10 ใน mesenchyme surrounding elongated bud stalk → prevents new branching at stalk

Sprouty2 (Spry2): expressed at bud tips; FGF10 induces Spry2 → Spry2 inhibits MAPK/FGF signaling = intracellular negative feedback. ↑ Spry2 transgenic → severely impaired branching; Spry2-/- → reduced branching + cystic formation
Net result: FGF10 ↑ at new bud foci → elongation → SHH + Spry2 inhibit FGF10 locally → cleft forms = branching point. TGF-β1 ↑ ECM (collagen, fibronectin) ใน cleft areas → anchors branching point
2.4 BMP4, TGF-β, และ Wnt
BMP4: FGF10 induces BMP4 in epithelium → balanced BMP4 required; both overexpression AND blockade → abnormal cystic development. Smad1 mediates BMP signaling; conditional Alk3 deletion → ↓ branching

TGF-β1/2/3: TGF-β1 inhibits FGF10 expression in lung explants + inhibits branching + promotes mesenchymal differentiation (α-SMA, collagen). Accumulates in bud stalks/between buds with ECM — helps define non-branching zones. Smad2/3/4 abrogation → ↑ branching

Wnt signaling: multiple Wnt ligands (Wnt2/2b, Wnt4, Wnt5a, Wnt7b) control proximal-distal patterning, cell proliferation, vascular formation. Canonical β-catenin pathway critical; Dkk1 (Wnt inhibitor) → disrupted branching + defective vasculature. Hox5 genes (Hoxa5/Hoxb5/Hoxc5) → upstream mesenchymal regulators of Wnt2/2b-BMP4 axis

Summary: Branching Morphogenesis Network
FGF10 (mesenchyme) → FGFR2b (epithelium) = drive. SHH (epithelium) → Gli2/3 (mesenchyme) → ↓FGF10 = brake at elongating stalk. Spry2 (epithelium) → ↓MAPK = intracellular brake. BMP4: balanced. TGF-β1: ↑ECM in cleft → anchors branch point. Wnt/β-catenin: P-D patterning. RA → FGF10 induction. Clinical implication: agents altering any of these (e.g., infection ↑TGF-β, oligohydramnios ↓stretch) → pulmonary hypoplasia.
3. Regulatory Mechanisms of Alveolarization

Alveolarization คือ process ที่ expand gas-exchange surface area 20-fold จาก birth (0–50M alveoli) ถึง adulthood (>300M). เกิดจาก secondary septation ที่ต้องการ myofibroblasts + elastin + capillary network + ATII/ATI cells ทำงานร่วมกัน
3.1 PDGF-A / Myofibroblast / Elastin Axis
PDGF-A (PDGFα): secreted by ATII cells → chemoattractant สำหรับ interstitial lipofibroblasts → differentiate → myofibroblasts at alveolar entry ring
Myofibroblasts express α-SMA + PDGFRα (high) + produce tropoelastin → lysyl oxidase crosslinks → elastin fibers ที่ tip ของ secondary septa — elastin scaffold คือ framework สำหรับ septation
Pdgfα-/- mice: profound deficiency ของ alveolar myofibroblasts + elastin bundles → no secondary septa, no definitive alveoli. Imatinib (PDGFR antagonist) impairs alveolarization in postnatal lung
FGFR3/FGFR4 double knockout: failed to undergo secondary septation — FGF family critical for alveolar as well as airway development

Retinoic acid (RA): synthesizing enzymes + receptors abundant during alveolar septation; RA receptor deletions → ↓ alveoli + ↓ elastin. RA crosstalk with PDGF + FGF signaling. Notch signaling → induces PDGFα in ATII → activates PDGFRα in myofibroblasts
3.2 External Stressors ที่กระทบ Alveolarization

rows: Le Cras Am J Physiol 2000: neonatal dex → ↑ pulmonary HTN in adult. จำ: avoid postnatal dex ยกเว้น VLBW ที่ extubation ไม่ได้
Alejandre-Alcázar Am J Physiol 2007: TGF-β/BMP dysregulation. ↓VEGF, ↓VEGFR. Target SpO2 91–95% ใน preterm
Ambalavanan Am J Physiol 2008. CDH + severe BPD มี chronic hypoxia-driven remodeling
Massaro Am J Physiol 2007. Preterm ที่ receive inadequate nutrition → delayed alveolarization; RA rescues

blocks.text:
⚠️ Postnatal Dexamethasone — Alveolarization Permanently Arrested
แม้แต่ low-dose postnatal dexamethasone completely inhibits alveolarization irreversibly extending to adulthood (ผลหลายสูตรยืนยัน). นี่คือเหตุผลที่ AAP ไม่แนะนำ routine postnatal dex ใน BPD. ถ้าจำเป็นต้อง extubate — ใช้ hydrocortisone แทน dexamethasone เพราะ alveolarization effect น้อยกว่า (แม้ยังไม่ ideal).
4. Airway Epithelial Cell Lineages และ Surfactant System
4.1 Proximal vs Distal Cell Fate
Proximal airways (Sox2, FoxJ1, Notch): Sox2 → proximal endoderm progenitors → mature lineages; FoxJ1 → multiciliated cells จาก Sox2+ progenitors; Notch → balance ของ secretory/ciliated/basal cells

Distal alveolar (ATI + ATII): Distal tip progenitors เป็น bipotent — express both ATI + ATII markers late gestation แล้ว differentiate. ATII: cuboidal, lamellar bodies → surfactant production + progenitor repair. ATI: flat, thin, gas exchange
4.2 Surfactant System

4 surfactant proteins: SP-A, SP-D: hydrophilic collectins → innate immunity (bind bacteria, viruses, fungi, promote macrophage phagocytosis); SP-B, SP-C: hydrophobic → surface tension reduction, lamellar body formation, film stability

SP-B essential: hereditary SP-B deficiency → no lamellar bodies, lethal RDS at birth. SP-B deficiency also → absent mature SP-C (SP-B needed for SP-C processing). SP-C deficiency alone: survive, normal lamellar bodies — ไม่ perinatal lethal
ABCA3 (ATP-binding cassette transporter A3): ใน lamellar body membrane → required for phosphatidylcholine (PC) transfer ใน lamellar body. ABCA3 mutation → severe neonatal RDS
Surfactant secretion triggers: catecholamines, purinoreceptor agonists, cell stretch — นี่คือเหตุผลที่ first breaths + labor catecholamine surge ช่วย prime surfactant release
GPR116: orphan G-protein coupled receptor ใน respiratory epithelium → regulates surfactant homeostasis; Gpr116 mutation → excess surfactant secretion → accumulate in airspaces

Nkx2.1 regulates SP-A, SP-B, SP-C, SP-D gene expression — required for normal surfactant synthesis at birth. Glucocorticoids → ↑ surfactant synthesis primarily via ↑ gene expression (precocious maturation)

rows: Innate immunity; opsonizes bacteria/viruses/fungi; modulates macrophage; clearance/metabolism of surfactant
Detected amniotic fluid ≥30 wk; ↑ by cAMP + glucocorticoid (biphasic)
Film spreading, tubular myelin formation, lamellar body formation; essential for SP-C processing
Hereditary deficiency = lethal RDS; mRNA 14 wk, protein ≥24 wk, amniotic fluid ≥30 wk
Film stability; membrane-spanning; palmitoylation; assembled with PC in lamellar body
Deficiency alone: non-lethal neonatal; ILD in older children
Innate immunity; binds LPS, LTA; modulates neutrophils, eosinophils, lymphocytes
Low in 2nd trimester; ↑ 3rd trimester; ↑↑ after preterm birth

blocks.text: 5. Pulmonary Vascular Development
5.1 Vasculogenesis vs Angiogenesis
Vasculogenesis: de novo formation จาก angioblasts/endothelial precursors ใน mesodermal mesenchyme — predominant ใน distal/peripheral lung + early development (< 17 wk)

Angiogenesis: formation จาก preexisting vessels (sprouting) — predominant ใน proximal lung, dominates ใน canalicular stage onward. Proximal + distal vessels fuse via lytic process → luminal connection

3rd mechanism: intussusceptive microvascular growth — transluminal tissue pillars form within capillaries → expand → ↑ capillary surface area. Responsible for 35-fold capillary volume expansion from birth to adulthood
5.2 VEGF — Central Angiogenic Factor

VEGF (vascular endothelial growth factor): produced by airway/alveolar epithelial cells; binds VEGFR2 (Flk-1) on endothelial cells → proliferation, migration, tube formation. VEGF expression ↑ in canalicular/saccular stage ↑ by hypoxia via HIF transcription factors

VEGF isoforms: VEGF122, VEGF164, VEGF188. Individual knockout Vegf, Vegfr1, Vegfr2 → embryonic lethal. Epithelial-specific Vegf deletion → ↓ capillaries + ↓ primary septation + ↓ HGF expression → septation defect

VEGF + HGF crosstalk: VEGF from epithelium → ↑ HGF in endothelium → signals back to epithelium → coordinates septation. VEGF also interacts with RA signaling (conditional Vegf inactivation → ↓RA; RA treatment → partially rescues)
5.3 Angiopoietins / Tie2 Axis
Ang1: vascular remodeling, maturation, stabilization; ↑ from P1–P14 postnatally. Works complementary with VEGF: VEGF initiates vessels, Ang1 matures/stabilizes
Ang2: ↑ at birth → ↓ inversely with Ang1 postnatally. Combined VEGF+Ang1 gene therapy → ↓ capillary leakage + ↑ alveolar/vascular development in hyperoxia-BPD models

eNOS/nitric oxide: NO mediates VEGF angiogenic activity. VEGFR inhibitor (SU5416) → ↓eNOS → ↓ alveolarization + ↑PPHN. Inhaled NO → improves alveolar development ใน VEGFR-inhibitor model. eNOS-deficient mice → alveolar capillary dysplasia phenotype

Clinical Link: VEGF เป็นทั้ง Biomarker และ Therapeutic Target ใน BPD
Lassus Am J Crit Care Med 1999: preterm infants ที่จะ develop BPD มี lower VEGF ใน tracheal aspirates ตั้งแต่วันแรก vs ไม่เป็น BPD. Bhatt Am J Respir Crit Care Med 2001: autopsy BPD → ↓ VEGF + ↓VEGFR1 + ↓ PECAM-1 ใน capillary endothelium. Therapeutic VEGF ใน rat models → ↑ survival + ↑ alveolarization แต่ ↑ leaky capillaries ถ้า dose สูง — tight regulation required
6. Lung Injury and Repair — Pathogenesis of BPD

BPD = developmental arrest of lung development at the saccular stage ไม่ใช่แค่ lung injury. Caused by: mechanical ventilation + oxygen toxicity + perinatal/postnatal infection ใน immature lung. Pathologic hallmarks: larger, simplified distal air spaces + decreased vascular growth → impaired gas exchange + pulmonary hypertension
6.1 NLRP3 Inflammasome and IL-1β
First signal: tissue injury → endogenous danger signals → TLR2/TLR4 → MyD88 → NF-κB → ↑ pro-IL-1β
Second signal: extracellular ATP → P2X7 receptor → forms NLRP3 inflammasome (NLRP3 + ASC + pro-caspase1) → cleaves pro-caspase1 → caspase1 (p20) → cleaves pro-IL-1β → mature IL-1β + IL-18 secreted

BPD evidence: (1) ↑ IL-1β ใน amniotic fluid + BAL → predicts BPD development; (2) IL-1β/IL-1ra ratio ↑ ใน infants developing BPD; (3) Transgenic IL-1β overexpression in Clara cells → alveolar simplification resembling BPD even without hyperoxia
Treatment with rIL-1ra (anakinra): hyperoxia-exposed rats/mice → ↓ inflammation + ↑ alveolarization (Nold PNAS 2013 — gold standard preclinical study)
6.2 TGF-β / CTGF Fibrosis Axis
Kotecha J Pediatr 1996: BAL TGF-β ↑ before BPD development → causal role confirmed. TGF-β ↑ ใน amniotic fluid + chorioamnionitis severity + BPD duration of O₂ therapy
Mechanisms: ↑ TGF-β → ↓ elastin synthesis (↓lysyl oxidase), ↓ alveolarization, ↑ apoptosis, ↑ fibrosis. Overexpression Tgfβ in respiratory epithelium → arrested development at pseudoglandular stage

CTGF (connective tissue growth factor): downstream coactivator ของ TGF-β; promotes fibroproliferation. Ctgf-/- mice → neonatal death + respiratory failure + hypoplastic lungs. Overexpression → ↑ thickened alveolar septae + ↓ alveolarization + ↑ pulmonary hypertension
BPD clinical data: ↑ CTGF ใน BAL ของ preterm BPD + ใน lung autopsy BPD. CTGF-neutralizing antibody: ↑ alveolar/vascular development + ↓ vascular remodeling + ↓ PHT ใน neonatal rat hyperoxia model
6.3 ↓ VEGF Signaling in BPD
Hyperoxia → ↓ VEGF + ↓VEGFR1 + ↓VEGFR2 ใน rabbits, rodents, preterm baboons/lambs. Mechanical ventilation → ↓ VEGF + VEGFRs ใน newborn mice + preterm baboons
BPD = shift จาก traditional angiogenic factors → alternative regulators: endoglin (hypoxia-inducible TGF-β coreceptor) ↑ ใน ventilated preterm infants → BPD-associated microvascular dysangiogenesis

Therapeutic VEGF: recombinant VEGF ใน rat BPD → ↑ alveolar/vascular development แต่ ↑ leaky capillaries. Adenovirus VEGF gene therapy → ↑ survival + ↑ angiogenesis แต่ ↑ lung edema. Combined VEGF + Ang1 gene therapy → ↓ leakage + ↑ vascular development
6.4 miRNA in BPD
miR-17 family: controls FGF10-mediated lung branching morphogenesis. Dicer deletion → inhibits branching (miRNA essential)
Dysregulated ใน BPD: miR-206, miR-150, miR-489 ↓ ใน both clinical + animal BPD; their target genes (fibronectin, glycoprotein b, IGF-1, tenascin) inversely ↑
miR-17~92 cluster: ↓ ใน BPD autopsy + ↓ miR-17/miR-92 ใน plasma ของ patients ที่ develop BPD. miR-489 inhibition → ↑ alveolar development ใน hyperoxia BPD model
7. NICU Practical — จาก Molecular Biology ถึง Bedside

Antenatal corticosteroids: mechanism = ↑ Nkx2.1-driven surfactant gene expression (SP-A/B/C/D) + ↑ ATII differentiation + ↑ ENaC → lung fluid clearance + ↑ β-adrenergic responsiveness. Target: GA 24–34 wk, ให้ 48 hr ก่อน delivery

Surfactant therapy mechanism: ทดแทน SP-B + SP-C + phospholipids ที่ขาด → ↓ surface tension → ↓ atelectasis → ↑ FRC. Early rescue vs prophylactic: ปัจจุบัน early selective rescue ดีกว่า prophylactic ใน era of antenatal steroids
Oxygen targeting 91–95% ใน preterm: เหตุผล: hyperoxia → ↓VEGF → ↓ alveolarization + ↑TGF-β + ↑ oxidant injury; hypoxia → ↑TGF-β + ↑PPHN. BOOST II, SUPPORT trials: SpO2 85–89% → ↑ mortality แม้ ↓ ROP
Gentle ventilation (avoid volutrauma): high tidal volume → ↑CTGF + ↑TGF-β ใน newborn lung (Wu Pediatr Res 2008). Permissive hypercapnia, HFOV, early extubation → ↓ volutrauma → ↓ BPD
Avoid postnatal dexamethasone: irreversibly inhibits alveolarization. ถ้า steroid จำเป็น → hydrocortisone 1 mg/kg/day (PREMILOC trial: ↑ survival without BPD ใน < 28 wk, ตอนนี้ NEC concerns ongoing)
Optimize nutrition: starvation → ↓ alveolarization (reversible by refeeding + RA). PN เริ่มวันที่ 1, target protein 3–4 g/kg/day, EN ทันทีที่ stable — ช่วย VEGF + PDGF signaling
Inhaled NO ใน CDH/PPHN: mechanism: ↑ eNOS + NO → ↑ VEGF angiogenic activity → ↑ alveolar development + vasodilation. iNO: 20 ppm ใน term/near-term PPHN, ongoing study ใน preterm BPD prevention
8. 5 Bedside Pearls — สำหรับใช้พรุ่งนี้

PEARL 1 — BPD = Developmental Arrest, ไม่ใช่แค่ Scarring
BPD คือ arrest of saccular/alveolar development — VEGF ↓, alveolarization ↓, capillaries ↓ — ไม่ใช่แค่ fibrosis จาก ventilator. เข้าใจนี้ → เข้าใจว่าทำไม gentlest ventilation + antenatal steroids + early nutrition ลด BPD: เพราะไม่ disrupt developmental signals. BPD เบา = development delayed; BPD รุนแรง = development arrested permanently.

PEARL 2 — Postnatal Dex: ห้าม Routine, เพราะ Irreversible Alveolar Damage
Corticosteroids completely and irreversibly inhibit alveolarization แม้แต่ low dose (Le Cras 2000). ↑ pulmonary hypertension ใน adult rats ที่ได้ neonatal dex. AAP 2002: dexamethasone ไม่แนะนำ routine. ถ้าจำเป็น (extubation failure) → hydrocortisone, short course, lowest dose, บอกครอบครัว risk.

PEARL 3 — FGF10 / VEGF Axis: ทำไมต้อง Optimize Everything
FGF10 ถูก inhibit โดย TGF-β, SHH, hypoxia, infection. VEGF ถูก suppress โดย hyperoxia, mechanical ventilation, LPS. ทั้งสองเป็น key morphogenic signals ที่ preterm lung ยังต้องการ. ดังนั้น bundle of care: antenatal steroid + targeted O₂ + gentle vent + early nutrition + infection control = ป้องกัน simultaneous pathway disruption.

PEARL 4 — NLRP3 Inflammasome: Chorioamnionitis → BPD Mechanism
Chorioamnionitis → endogenous danger signals → TLR2/4 (signal 1) + ATP → P2X7 (signal 2) → NLRP3 inflammasome assembly → mature IL-1β. IL-1β ↑ ใน amniotic fluid ก่อน BPD (Yoon Am J OG 1997). rIL-1ra (anakinra) attenuates BPD in preclinical models. Clinical เริ่มศึกษา — เป็น novel target ที่สำคัญ.

PEARL 5 — Limit of Viability = Canalicular Biology
GA 24 wk = limit of viability เพราะ end of canalicular stage = first air-blood barrier formed. ก่อน 24 wk: no alveolocapillary membrane sufficient for gas exchange — no structural basis for survival. หลัง 24 wk: saccular development begins, surfactant matures progressively. อธิบาย limit of viability ได้ด้วย molecular biology: เป็น threshold ของ structural gas exchange capacity, ไม่ใช่เรื่อง arbitrary.
9. Evidence Update — Landmark Studies
Wu S, Bancalari E. The Newborn Lung 2019 (Ch1): Comprehensive review — 5 stages, key signaling pathways, BPD pathogenesis. Central reference for this lesson.
Kotecha S et al. J Pediatr 1996;128:464: BAL TGF-β ↑ before BPD development in preterm infants — established TGF-β as causal BPD biomarker.
Lassus P et al. Am J Crit Care Med 1999;159:1429: ↓ VEGF in tracheal aspirates in preterm infants who developed BPD vs no-BPD — VEGF as early BPD biomarker.
Bhatt AJ et al. Am J Respir Crit Care Med 2001;164:1971: BPD autopsy: ↓ VEGF + ↓ VEGFR1 + ↓ TIE-2 + ↓ PECAM-1 — confirms disrupted vascular development in BPD.
Liao J et al. Nat Commun 2015 (NLRP3 BPD): NLRP3 inflammasome critically involved in BPD development; rIL-1ra improves alveolarization in hyperoxia mouse model.
Nold MF et al. PNAS 2013;110:14384: IL-1ra prevents BPD induced by perinatal inflammation + hyperoxia in mice — strongest preclinical evidence for IL-1 targeting in BPD.
Alejandre-Alcázar MA et al. Am J Physiol 2007;292:L537: Hyperoxia modulates TGF-β/BMP signaling in mouse BPD model — explains hyperoxia → BPD molecular mechanism.
Le Cras TD et al. Am J Physiol 2000;278:L822: Neonatal dexamethasone → ↑ pulmonary hypertension in adult rats — key study confirming irreversible long-term harm.
Wu S et al. Pediatr Res 2008;63:245: High tidal volume ventilation → ↑ CTGF in newborn rat lung — volutrauma-BPD molecular link.
Alapati D et al. Am J Respir Cell Mol Biol 2011;45:1169: CTGF-neutralizing antibody → ↑ alveolar/vascular development + ↓ PHT in neonatal rat hyperoxia BPD — validates CTGF as therapeutic target.
Rogers LK et al. Ann Am Thorac Soc 2015;12:1506: miR-17~92 cluster ↓ in BPD autopsy + ↓ miR-17, miR-92 in plasma of BPD patients — miRNA as BPD biomarker.
SUPPORT Study Group. NEJM 2010;362:1959: SpO2 85–89% vs 91–95% in preterm — lower target ↑ mortality despite ↓ ROP; supports 91–95% target aligned with VEGF/alveolarization biology.
Boström H et al. Cell 1996;85:863 (PDGF-A): PDGF-A signaling critical for lung alveolar myofibroblast development — definitive proof of PDGF axis in alveolarization.
10. Self-Check Questions พร้อมเฉลย
Q: อธิบาย 5 stages ของ lung development พร้อม GA และ key structural event ในแต่ละ stage

ตอบ: (1) Embryonic (4–7 wk): lung bud → trachea + lobar bronchi; tracheoesophageal separation. (2) Pseudoglandular (5–17 wk): branching → 16 airway generations to terminal bronchioles; proximal cell differentiation; diaphragm closure. (3) Canalicular (16–26 wk): respiratory bronchioles; first air-blood barrier ~24 wk; ATII begin surfactant. (4) Saccular (24–36 wk): primary septation → saccules; double capillary; mature ATII surfactant; elastic fibers. (5) Alveolar (36 wk → childhood): secondary septation; 50M → 300M alveoli; double → single capillary. จำ: alveolarization เป็น postnatal process ส่วนใหญ่.
Q: FGF10 มีบทบาทอย่างไรใน branching morphogenesis? อะไร regulate/inhibit FGF10?

ตอบ: FGF10: secreted จาก distal mesenchyme → binds FGFR2b ใน epithelium → MAPK activation → chemotaxis + proliferation → bud elongation toward FGF10 source. FGF10 deletion → lung agenesis. Inhibitors: (1) SHH (epithelium → Gli2/3 → ↓FGF10 in stalk mesenchyme); (2) Spry2 (epithelial intracellular feedback ↓ MAPK); (3) TGF-β1 markedly inhibits FGF10 in lung explant. Inducers: RA via RARβ in mesoderm. Heparan sulfate provides location-specific patterning.
Q: อธิบาย mechanism ของ alveolarization: PDGF-A → secondary septation

ตอบ: ATII cells produce PDGF-A → chemoattractant สำหรับ interstitial lipofibroblasts → differentiate → myofibroblasts (high PDGFRα, α-SMA) at alveolar entry ring → produce tropoelastin → lysyl oxidase → elastin fibers at septum tip. Myofibroblasts + ATI/ATII + endothelial cells migrate together into secondary septae. Pdgfα-/- mice: no myofibroblasts, no elastin, no secondary septa, no alveoli. External inhibitors: corticosteroids, hyperoxia, hypoxia, starvation. External promoters: RA, thyroid hormone, nutrition, estrogen.
Q: NLRP3 inflammasome ทำงานอย่างไรในการก่อ BPD? อธิบาย 2 signals

ตอบ: Signal 1: tissue injury → endogenous danger signals → TLR2/4 → MyD88 → NF-κB → ↑ pro-IL-1β. Signal 2: extracellular ATP → P2X7 receptor → NLRP3+ASC+pro-caspase1 = inflammasome complex → caspase1 (p20) → cleaves pro-IL-1β → mature IL-1β secreted → IL-1R signaling → inflammatory cascade. ใน BPD: ↑ IL-1β ใน amniotic fluid + BAL predicts BPD; IL-1β/IL-1ra ratio ↑ ใน infants ที่ develop BPD. rIL-1ra (anakinra) → ↓ inflammation + ↑ alveolarization in preclinical models.
Q: ทำไม postnatal dexamethasone จึงห้ามใช้ routine ใน BPD? และถ้าต้องให้มีทางเลือกอะไร?

ตอบ: Corticosteroids completely inhibit alveolarization — irreversible, extends to adulthood (Le Cras 2000; multiple studies). นอกจากนี้ → ↑ pulmonary hypertension ใน adult. AAP 2002: ไม่แนะนำ routine postnatal dex. ทางเลือก: hydrocortisone 1 mg/kg/day: alveolarization effect น้อยกว่า; PREMILOC trial (Baud NEJM 2016) → ↑ survival without BPD ใน < 28 wk แต่ NEC concerns ยังอยู่. ถ้าต้องใช้ dex → short course, lowest dose, clear indication (extubation failure), บอกครอบครัว.
Q: VEGF มีบทบาทอย่างไรใน normal alveolarization? เกิดอะไรขึ้นกับ VEGF ใน BPD?

ตอบ: Normal: VEGF จาก epithelium → VEGFR2 (Flk-1) ใน endothelial cells → proliferation, migration, tube formation. VEGF ↑ in canalicular/saccular stage ↑ by HIF (hypoxia). Epithelial Vegf deletion → absence of capillaries + ↓ primary septation. ใน BPD: ↓ VEGF in tracheal aspirates before BPD (Lassus 1999); ↓ VEGF + VEGFR1 + PECAM-1 in BPD autopsy (Bhatt 2001). Caused by hyperoxia + mechanical ventilation. BPD = shift to endoglin-mediated dysangiogenesis. Therapeutic VEGF improves alveolar/vascular development but ↑ leakage at high dose → VEGF+Ang1 combination better.
Q: อธิบาย role ของ TGF-β และ CTGF ใน BPD pathogenesis

ตอบ: TGF-β: ↑ ใน BAL ก่อน BPD (Kotecha 1996); ↑ ใน amniotic fluid of chorioamnionitis → predicts BPD. Mechanism: ↓ FGF10, ↓ elastin (↓ lysyl oxidase), ↓ alveolarization, ↑ apoptosis, ↑ ECM fibrosis. CTGF: downstream coactivator ของ TGF-β; expressed in distal airway epithelium. Ctgf-/- → neonatal death from respiratory failure. Overexpression → ↑ alveolar thickening + ↓ alveolarization + ↑ PHT. Hyperoxia/high TV ventilation → ↑ CTGF. CTGF antibody therapy → improves BPD in neonatal rats (Alapati 2011).
Q: Nkx2.1 (TTF-1) คืออะไร? deletion เกิดอะไรขึ้น? regulate อะไรบ้าง?

ตอบ: Nkx2.1 = thyroid transcription factor 1 (TTF-1): earliest TF ใน prospective lung/tracheal endoderm. Deletion → abnormal cystic lung, ↓ branching, ↓ SP-C. Regulated upstream by: Wnt2/2b-β-catenin (induces), TGF-β (inhibits), Shh/Gli2/3 (activates). Regulates downstream: SP-A, SP-B, SP-C, SP-D, SCGB1A1 (club cell protein). Positive feedback: Nkx2.1 binds its own promoter. Clinical: Nkx2.1/TTF-1 mutations → neonatal RDS + hypothyroidism + neurological symptoms (brain-lung-thyroid syndrome).
Q: อธิบาย vasculogenesis vs angiogenesis ใน pulmonary vascular development

ตอบ: Vasculogenesis: de novo formation จาก angioblasts/mesodermal progenitors — predominant ใน distal/peripheral lung + early gestation (< 17 wk). Angiogenesis: sprouting จาก preexisting vessels (EC proliferation + migration) — predominant ใน proximal lung + canalicular stage onward. Both occur concurrently, proximal+distal vessels fuse via lytic process. 3rd mechanism: intussusceptive growth (transluminal pillars) → 35-fold capillary volume expansion birth → adulthood. VEGF (epithelial) → VEGFR2 (endothelial) = central angiogenic driver.
Q: preterm infant ที่ GA 26 wk lung อยู่ใน stage ไหน? คาด complications อะไร?

ตอบ: GA 26 wk = late canalicular to early saccular stage: (1) Surfactant ↓ → severe RDS, ต้องการ exogenous surfactant + respiratory support; (2) Alveolarization has not begun → any injury = BPD risk; (3) Antioxidant enzymes immature → hyperoxia injury; (4) SP-A/D low → ↓ innate immunity → infection risk; (5) Mucociliary clearance immature (↑ goblet:ciliated ratio) → ↑ mucus obstruction; (6) Vascular smooth muscle immature (↑ muscularization) → PPHN risk. Bundle of care: antenatal steroid, early surfactant, gentle vent, O₂ 91–95%, avoid infection, optimize nutrition.
Day 38 Preview

The Newborn Lung Ch.2 — Perinatal Events and Their Influence on Lung Development
พรุ่งนี้ต่อด้วย Perinatal Events and Their Influence on Lung Development — หลังเรียน molecular blueprint ของ lung development วันนี้ เราจะมาดูว่า antenatal corticosteroids, chorioamnionitis, fetal breathing movements, และ labor hormones modulate หรือ disrupt developmental program อย่างไร. เนื้อหาหลัก: mechanism ของ antenatal steroid ใน surfactant maturation (GR-mediated transcription), chorioamnionitis paradox (precocious maturation vs injury), ENaC regulation ของ lung fluid clearance, และ catecholamine surge ใน labor. เชื่อมกับวันนี้: FGF10, TGF-β, VEGF pathways ที่เรียนวันนี้จะถูก modulate โดย perinatal events ที่จะเรียนพรุ่งนี้.
